MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN KREMER'S MOTION TO STRIKE
Appearances:
Regulo Sierra (672.3637) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona
Steven Kremer (292.7230) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar as moot in light of ruling on demurrer. Order signed in open Court. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN KREMER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances:
Regulo Sierra (672.3637) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona
Steven Kremer (292.7230) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend. Res judicata bars the filing of this complaint which is identical to an earlier complaint filed by plaintiff which was dismissed with prejudice. Order signed in open Court. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
